title: Self-Hosted Notification Platform
summary: An end-to-end notification platform built around a Next.js frontend, .NET services, RabbitMQ messaging, and PostgreSQL.
highlights: Designed and self-hosted the platform end to end.
Combined a Next.js frontend with .NET services and RabbitMQ-based messaging.
Covered architecture, deployment, and operational concerns alongside feature delivery.

title: Enterprise React & .NET Delivery
summary: A body of enterprise application work built with React and .NET Core, deployed across frontend and backend environments on AWS.
highlights: Developed applications across both frontend and backend layers.
Handled frontend and backend deployments using AWS.
Contributed to sprint planning, onboarding, technical leadership, and software migration work.

title: High-Availability Database Systems
summary: Database-focused work centered on designing and implementing reliable systems that match end-user roles and information needs.
highlights: Built database systems with a focus on availability and quality.
Designed databases around specialized user roles, information needs, and views.
Worked alongside application maintenance and error resolution in a production setting.

title: Reusable Blazor Component Library
summary: A set of reusable Blazor libraries and components focused on clean APIs and maintainable UI building blocks.
highlights: Built reusable Blazor components instead of one-off screens.
Focused on clean APIs that made the library easier to consume and maintain.
Treated component quality and reuse as part of long-term UI maintainability.
